message:
feat(widgets): implement MeasurableWidget for complex widgets (bd-2dow.4)

- Table: calculates content-based size constraints with 8 unit tests
- Sparkline: measures data-based width with 4 unit tests
- ProgressBar: supports block overhead in measurements with 3 tests
- MiniBar: handles percentage width display with 3 tests
- command_palette: add no-op stubs for non-tracing builds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
